appliedUpdates.description: Aligned `.factory/library/design-system.md`, `.factory/library/tradebetter-exact-design-reference.md`, and `.factory/library/tradebetter-comparison-evidence.md` so the shared guidance now consistently documents all visible text as white and limits `--text-muted` to border/divider-only usage.

Aligned `.factory/library/design-system.md`, `.factory/library/architecture.md`, and `.factory/library/tradebetter-exact-design-reference.md` with the shipped liquid-metal card treatment: 0.04 base opacity, 0.08 hover opacity, 0.12 border opacity, subtle inset glow, and no backdrop blur.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature contract bans non-white text or other full-surface color regressions, require placeholder/pseudo-element inspection in browser or computed-style sweeps and in regression coverage, not only audits of standard text nodes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original failing review for `readability-white-text-everywhere-and-token-overhaul` found the worker's browser audit queried common text tags only, while `src/components/tokenomics/ScenarioSwitcher.tsx` still shipped grey placeholders via `placeholder:text-muted` until the follow-up fix landed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` should be false when required pre-change `.factory/library` review is omitted or only appears later in the transcript after implementation has started.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The prior review for `readability-transparent-liquid-metal-cards-complement-shader` found the handoff reported `followedProcedure: true` even though transcript-visible `.factory/library` review appeared only later in the session.
